title: niphobolus nummulariifolius
intro: Niphobolus nummulariifolius, also known as the coin-leaved niphobolus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Niphobolus nummulariifolius include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Niphobolus nummulariifolius include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
